emails.subject: Re: #529538
emails.body: Re: #529538 Deal should be no confirm. It was done by Stan Cocke in Services, and those guys deal directly with their counterparty contacts. He thought he marked this no confirm, but must have defaulted to confirm anyway. I'll change deal as soon as risk is done with their calc. Kate From: Sharen Cason 02/23/2001 01:59 PM

emails.subject: Re: #529538
emails.body: I just forwarded this e-mail to Stan and then spoke with him about the confirm on this deal. He said he's never received a letter of confirmation on these Valley Electric deals they just verbally confirm them. I've given him your name, and he should be contacting you shortly to discuss how to proceed on this. Please let me know how I can help. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 02/27/2001 06:45 AM
